title: Scheduled Task Scheduling
subtitle: Cron/Task Scheduling
description: Provides scheduled task capabilities for Agents, supporting three scheduling modes: one-time (at), periodic (every), and cron expressions. Tasks are persisted and Agents can autonomously create schedules through tool invocation.
sub_problems: Schedule execution and Agent callback integration
best_practices: Define scheduling as a data structure (CronSchedule) and manage lifecycle uniformly through CronService
Persist tasks to JSON files to support recovery after process restart
